message:
🐛 Replace node-pty with child_process, fix vite build

- node-pty's posix_spawnp fails on Node 22 / macOS arm64
- Switch to child_process.spawn which works reliably
- Remove node-pty dependency (no native module needed)
- Add root/outDir to vite config for proper builds
- Remove unused resize WS handler
- Tested: server starts, discovers 12 sessions, creates
  new sessions, streams copilot output as chat messages

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
